title: DNS Pollution Check
description: Query multiple public DNS servers globally to check if a domain's DNS resolution is polluted or hijacked.
msg_consistent: All queried servers returned the same IP addresses. The domain does not appear to be polluted.
msg_inconsistent: Servers returned different IP addresses. If this domain uses a CDN (like Cloudflare or Akamai), this is completely normal. Otherwise, it might be DNS pollution/hijacking.
